task_completion.visual_evidence: In the BlenderBIM/Bonsai Outliner or Group properties panel, an IfcGroup explicitly named 'Defect Remediation' is visible.

task_completion.description: Assign at least 3 walls to the 'Defect Remediation' group
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Defect Remediation' group in the Outliner or the group assignment panel shows at least 3 IfcWall elements assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Assign at least 1 slab to the 'Defect Remediation' group
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Defect Remediation' group in the Outliner or the group assignment panel shows at least 1 IfcSlab element assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Enrich the defective elements with a 'Pset_Condition' property set
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Object Properties > IFC Properties panel for the selected defective elements, a property set named 'Pset_Condition' has been added.

task_completion.description: Set 'AssessmentCondition' to 'Poor' and detail the defect in 'AssessmentDescription'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Pset_Condition' property set, the property 'AssessmentCondition' is set to 'Poor', and 'AssessmentDescription' contains text describing a defect.

task_completion.description: Save the enriched IFC project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, Blender info notification, or terminal window showing the file being saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_condition_assessment.ifc'.

integrity.description: Agent used the BlenderBIM/Bonsai GUI to perform the condition assessment
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Blender interface (3D viewport, Outliner, Properties panels) rather than a text editor or terminal script modifying the IFC file directly.

integrity.description: The FZK-Haus model is genuinely loaded and interacted with
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays the FZK-Haus residential building model, confirming the agent didn't just create an empty file with the required properties.

integrity.description: Agent manually entered the property sets and values through the appropriate BIM menus
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the IFC custom property creation menus or the BlenderBIM property management interface being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Group Name: 'Defect Remediation'. Expected Property Set: 'Pset_Condition'. Expected Properties: 'AssessmentCondition' = 'Poor', and 'AssessmentDescription' containing text about the defect. Minimum elements in group: 3 walls and 1 slab. Output file path: '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_condition_assessment.ifc'.
